channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car bumpers, 30th June
item.description:
Discarded car parts

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farquhar Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large wardrobe on public pavement, 30th June
item.description:
School children and parents have to walk around it on public path causing an obstruction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Granville Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging bushes from house, 30th June
item.description:
Bushes are overgrown onto the pavement making it very hard to walk round especially if you have a pram or pushchair. The house on the corner owns the property but it is just left to grow even more
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Lower Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin collections at 4am, 30th June
item.description:
At least once a week the commercial bins are collected at around 4am and because they collecting from restaurants the sound of bottles crashing into the truck is incredibly, incredibly noisy and wakes me up almost each time. ESPECIALLY during the spring and summer when the windows are open. It is causing me distress as it is having a detrimental affect on my sleep and wellbeing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wemyss Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Basal growth and related issues, 30th June
item.description:
Recurrent problem - somebody suggested it could be a regular problem as trees grow basal shoots again... Junction Hammelton Rd and A21 London Rd. Third photo of similar issue across road at junction with Blyth Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped items still there after more than a week, 30th June
item.description:
These photos are of waste fly tipped by the litter bin on corner of Olinda Road, they span a week. It is a mixture of household items (mostly broken furniture), shop fittings & builders’ waste. It’s time it was removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Olinda Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole road pavements are cracked broken wobbling lots of people complaining, 30th June
item.description:
Outside 20 and 18 and 22 chaucer road sidcup pavements are in a terrible condition. I recently tripped and broke my finger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Chaucer Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive flytip, 30th June
item.description:
Lot of mattresses, toilets, sofas, and it stinks. A whole van full.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and drug has been dumped by a lamp post on the pavement including wire and alcohol bottles, 30th June
item.description:
It has been there for days and is beginning to collect other litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beck Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree, 30th June
item.description:
Tree collapse covering pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Ash Grove, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gross litter on the street for over a week, 30th June
item.description:
It stinks pls remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sleeping bag and carpet dumped on the pavement, 30th June
item.description:
Sleeping.bag and carpet dumped on the pavement close to one of the salt containers on Fountain Drive - near where broken tarmac from recent road fix is being stored. All needs removing please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fountain Drive, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping off Hockett Close green area, 30th June
item.description:
A range of fly tipped items have been left by a small utility building and on the path to the south of the building, mostly domestic items and building refuse. These have been here for some time - a couple of weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grove Street, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 28, middleham road london n18 2sb, 30th June
item.description:
Collapsed believed catv manhole in f/w.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleham Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike blocking access, 30th June
item.description:
Lime bike blocking access xxx-qbt

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and unnumbered green bin fly-tipped, 30th June
item.description:
A mattress and an unmarked green bin has been flytipped onto Brookhill Road. The green bin has been present for months (previously reported) and the mattress for a few days. Please can arrangements be made for both to be removed as soon as possible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookhill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-bikes blocking the bus stop, 30th June
item.description:
E-bikes blocking the bus stop. Passengers can’t board the bus

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12-16, Blenheim Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely uneven pavement, 30th June
item.description:
The pavement outside number 97 is extremely uneven. It has caused a number of incidents for resident as they are disabled and they have fallen over. The issue has got worse and worse over a number of years. The paving is affected by tree routes and different types of pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longton Avenue, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, broken glass and dog fouling, 30th June
item.description:
I reported it this morning, and it was changed to “resolved” by the council almost immediately after. I just walked through the area now and there was no change. Could you please stop closing the reports before the issue is addressed or I will escalate it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wallis Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflow bin in public bin, 30th June
item.description:
The cleaner is putting the bins in the public bin in the corner but no one is cleaning them

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orpen Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
